text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Everything in the old science room we<n>share... is
glowing a weird color. That<n>includes your research
equipment... and<n>everyone in my collection.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one who uses that<n>space...
Please be careful...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is an unfortunate side effect of my<n>latest
experiment, but I assure you it was<n>a complete
accident. Even I was not<n>expecting that outcome.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything will be back to normal within<n>an hour,
so there's no need to worry.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I gained some very valuable insight from<n>that
experiment. And thus, I would like<n>to perform it
again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to look at me like that...<n>Oh, fine.
I suppose I'll abandon the<n>experiment for now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As an apology, why don't I make you a<n>cup of
your favorite drink?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A coffee... from you, a tea drinker?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course. I have Darjeeling,<n>Assam, and
Earl Grey. Which can I get<n>for you?
